headline: Masimo Buyout By Danaher Faces Shareholder Scrutiny On Deal Value
summary: Danaher has agreed to acquire Masimo (NasdaqGS:MASI) in an all cash deal, subject to approval by Masimo shareholders. Several shareholder law firms have announced legal investigations into whether the deal terms and sales process are fair to Masimo investors. The outcome of the shareholder vote and any legal actions could affect the timing, terms, or completion of the transaction. Masimo shares most recently closed at $178.32, with the stock up 40.0% year to date and 15.9% over the past...
